---
title: "Hymnus"
---
```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }
});
</script>
```

![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0001_dwA_01.png){.glyph} *dwꜣ* [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0001_rDj.t-jAw_01.png){.glyph} *rdi.t iꜣw* ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0001_sn-tA-n_01.png){.glyph} *sn tꜣ n* ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0001_jn_01.png){.glyph} *in* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0001_Dd=f_01.png){.glyph} *ḏd⸗f* ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0001_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph} *inḏ-ḥr⸗k* / *⸗ṯ* / *⸗ṯn*   




## Übersetzung

Verehren/Anbeten [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN, Lobpreis geben den/der [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN, den Boden küssen für [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN von [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.slot-link .slot-person} NN – er sagt: Lobpreis dir/euch, sei gegrüßt/gegrüßst seist du ...

## Überschrift

*dwꜣ*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0001_dwA_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0010_dwA_02.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0020_dwA_seit-MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

*rdi.t iꜣw n*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0001_rDj.t-jAw_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0010_rDj.t-jAw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0020_rDj.t-jAw_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0030_rDj.t-jAw_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

*sn tꜣ n*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0001_sn-tA-n_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0010_sn-tA-n_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>




## Beter

*in*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0001_jn_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0010_jn_02.png){.glyph}

*ḏd⸗f*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0001_Dd=f_01.png){.glyph}




## Hauptteil

*inḏ-ḥr⸗*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0001_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph}






```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
